safety_use_cases.label: PPE compliance monitoring (bump caps and safety vests) with tuning and zoning
safety_use_cases.description: Monitor hat/vest compliance, reduce false positives by increasing minimum violation duration, and exclude entry areas where PPE is not required.

evidence.quote: I usually take a look at the Wednesday and Thursdays to see if anyone forgot to put their hat on or their vest, but I noticed it wasn't coming up.
evidence.speaker: Nico Blaine <fake.nico.blaine@southtrackdynamics.com>

evidence.quote: I want to go back through the cameras, because we are finding a lot of things like bump caps that are popping up.
evidence.speaker: Gale Hadley <fake.gale.hadley@southtrackdynamics.com>

evidence.quote: Okay, yeah, that would definitely be, I mean, if we went to like 15 seconds, I think that would be fine. It may give someone the opportunity to take their hat off, you know, wipe their brow, whatever they're doing.
evidence.speaker: Gale Hadley <fake.gale.hadley@southtrackdynamics.com>

evidence.quote: Well, the bump caps they need to have in all areas anyways.
evidence.speaker: Gale Hadley <fake.gale.hadley@southtrackdynamics.com>

evidence.quote: And or bump caps are not required because folks are coming in and out of the building.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: For the Safety Vest?
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: For the Safety Vest timeframes?
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: PIT–pedestrian proximity monitoring and walkway zoning/coverage
safety_use_cases.description: Address PIT-to-person proximity by improving camera angles/coverage and defining pedestrian walkways to reduce false positives.

evidence.quote: But they have, like, designated walkways, right?

evidence.quote: Unfortunately, we don't have that as clearly defined here.

evidence.quote: So we are having kind of what we call, like. False readings, and I'd like to kind of sit down and go through that with you again and see if we can kind of re-lay out some of the boxes and whatnot.
evidence.speaker: Gale Hadley <fake.gale.hadley@southtrackdynamics.com>

evidence.quote: we get pit to person sometimes, and the angle I think makes it look like they're within that three-foot range when they're, realistically, they're about five feet.

evidence.quote: it might make sense for us to re-allocate a different camera to maybe get a better view of a different area.

safety_use_cases.label: PIT parking duration monitoring at inbound docks
safety_use_cases.description: Detect and alert when powered industrial trucks are parked too long at docks to prevent dock leveler damage, with an extended threshold during active loading.

evidence.quote: So, the parking duration, Rob, popped up recently that we haven't seen and it was during the working time.
evidence.speaker: Nico Blaine <fake.nico.blaine@southtrackdynamics.com>

evidence.quote: I can tell the idea was dock levelers. We don't want damaging the dock levelers.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: Our rule is set up for 60 seconds.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: Maybe set for tens of minutes or something.
evidence.speaker: Quinn Tobin <fake.quinn.tobin@southtrackdynamics.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Ergonomic risk detection and multi-actor capture
safety_use_cases.description: Monitor improper lifting/overreaching and ensure simultaneous unsafe acts by multiple people are each detected and clipped.

evidence.quote: Right now, honestly, I think bump caps is probably the biggest one, other than the ergonomics ones, right?
evidence.speaker: Gale Hadley <fake.gale.hadley@southtrackdynamics.com>

evidence.quote: I know one of the things that was written down a while back ago was AI wasn't able to identify two people at the same time, overreaching.
evidence.speaker: Nico Blaine <fake.nico.blaine@southtrackdynamics.com>

evidence.quote: It only caught the one person, not the other person.
evidence.speaker: Nico Blaine <fake.nico.blaine@southtrackdynamics.com>

evidence.quote: That should have not happened, just to be clear.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: But if people are doing simultaneously the same thing, it should create two different clips, a.k.a. two different data points.
evidence.speaker: Alex Carver <fake.alex.carver@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Proactive safety analytics (heat maps and action/insights)
safety_use_cases.description: Use heat maps and AI-driven insights to highlight hotspots and suggest actions to reduce spikes in improper bending and other incidents.
